title: DONATED DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: DENTAL LIFELINE NETWORK DONATED DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental services to older adults, people with disabilities, and medically fragile individuals through a network of volunteer dentists and dental labs. A volunteer dentist will come up with a treatment plan, with the goal of making sure the patient is pain-free and able to eat properly. Does not provide emergency care. Services may include: -Dental cleanings -Cavity prevention (sealants, fluoride treatments/supplements) -Dental prosthodontics (dentures, bridges, crowns, implants) -Orthodontics -Endodontics -Dental restoration -Periodontics -Oral/maxillofacial surgery -Cosmetic dentistry 1800 15th Street Suite 100 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: Veterans and individuals who cannot pay for dental care and who are age 65 and older, have a permanent disability, or are medically compromised. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (503) 594-0837 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 594-0837 State of Oregon Marsha Thomas [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an application or download application from website. Visit website for state-specific information about eligibility and waitlist length. Cannot return phone calls about where you are on the waitlist due to the volume of calls received. Due to long waitlists, applications may only be available for specific counties. However, if you have documentation from a physician stating that you cannot receive essential medical treatment due to your dental condition, you can apply for the program even if your county is closed. Veterans who meet the qualifications can apply even if the waitlist is closed. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call or visit website for more information AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Deschutes, Douglas, Jackson, Lane, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures * Disabilities Issues Cavity Prevention Measures * Older Adults Cavity Prevention Measures * Veterans Cosmetic Dentistry * Disabilities Issues Cosmetic Dentistry * Older Adults Cosmetic Dentistry * Veterans Dental Hygiene * Disabilities Issues Dental Hygiene * Older Adults Dental Hygiene * Veterans Dental Prosthodontics * Disabilities Issues Dental Prosthodontics * Older Adults Dental Prosthodontics * Veterans Dental Restoration * Disabilities Issues Dental Restoration * Older Adults Endodontics * Disabilities Issues Endodontics * Older Adults Endodontics * Veterans Geriatric Dentistry * Veterans Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Disabilities Issues Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Older Adults Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Veterans Orthodontics * Disabilities Issues Orthodontics * Older Adults Orthodontics * Veterans Periodontics * Disabilities Issues Periodontics * Older Adults Periodontics * Veterans Special Care Dentistry * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DENTAL LIFELINE NETWORK
